acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By accessing or using this service, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our practices regarding your data as described below. If you do not agree to these terms, you must not use the service. We reserve the right to update these terms; we will notify you of material changes and require your acceptance before you may continue using the service. Your continued use after the effective date of any changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

useLicense.title: Use License
useLicense.description: Subject to your compliance with these terms, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use the service for your personal or internal business purposes. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of the service, nor may you reverse engineer or attempt to extract the source code of the service, except where expressly permitted by applicable law. You may not use the service for any illegal purpose or in any way that could damage, disable, or impair the service or interfere with any other party's use of the service.

userAccount.title: User Account
userAccount.description: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to protect your credentials. You must provide accurate and complete registration information and keep it up to date. One natural or legal person may maintain only one account unless we explicitly permit otherwise.

prohibitedUses.title: Prohibited Uses
prohibitedUses.description: You may not use the service: (a) in any way that violates applicable law or the rights of others; (b) to transmit malware, spam, or any harmful or illegal content; (c) to attempt to gain unauthorized access to the service, other accounts, or any connected system or network; (d) to scrape, harvest, or collect data from the service by automated means without our prior consent; (e) to resell or sublicense access to the service unless agreed in writing; or (f) in any way that could damage, disable, or overburden our infrastructure or that of our providers. We may suspend or terminate your access immediately if we reasonably believe you have violated these provisions.

termination.title: Termination
termination.description: We may suspend or terminate your account and access to the service at any time, with or without cause or notice, including for breach of these terms, fraudulent or illegal activity, or at our discretion for operational or legal reasons. Upon termination, your right to use the service ceases immediately. You may also terminate your account at any time through your account settings or by contacting us. Provisions that by their nature should survive (including ownership, disclaimers, indemnity, and limitations of liability) will survive termination.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.description: The service is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components. You use the service at your own risk.

privacyIntro.title: Privacy and Personal Data
privacyIntro.description: This section describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data. By using the service, you consent to the practices described here. We are committed to handling your data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.description: We collect: (1) Information you provide directly, such as name, email address, profile details, and any content you submit; (2) Account and authentication data, including credentials and OAuth identifiers; (3) Usage data, such as how you use the service, device and browser information, and IP address; (4) Communications and support data when you contact us. We may also receive information from third parties (e.g. identity providers) where you choose to sign in or link accounts. We do not collect more data than is necessary for the purposes described in these terms.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.description: We use the information we collect to: provide, operate, and improve the service; authenticate you and manage your account; process transactions and send related information; send service-related notices and updates; respond to your requests and support needs; monitor and analyze usage and trends; detect, prevent, and address fraud and abuse; comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms; and, with your consent where required, send marketing communications. We may use aggregated or de-identified data for analytics and product improvement.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.description: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information: (1) with service providers who assist us in operating the service (e.g. hosting, analytics, email delivery), under strict contractual obligations; (2) with your consent or at your direction; (3) to comply with law, court order, or government request, or to protect our rights and safety; (4) in connection with a merger, sale, or other transfer of assets, subject to the same privacy commitments. We require third parties to protect your data and use it only for the purposes we specify.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These include encryption in transit and at rest where applicable, access controls, and regular security assessments. Despite our efforts, no method of transmission or storage is completely secure; you provide data at your own risk, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.description: Depending on your location, you may have the right to: access and receive a copy of your personal data; correct or update inaccurate data; request deletion of your data; restrict or object to certain processing; data portability; withdraw consent where processing is consent-based; and lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. To exercise these rights, contact us using the details below. We will respond within the time required by applicable law.

cookies.title: Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to operate the service, remember your preferences, and analyze usage. For full details, including the types of cookies we use and how to manage them, please see our

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service or our handling of your data, or to exercise your rights, please contact us at the email or address provided in the service or on our website. We will respond within the time required by applicable law.

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies
whatAreCookies.description: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit our website or use our service. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, to provide a better experience, and to give the owners useful information. Cookies can be "first-party" (set by us) or "third-party" (set by other services we use). They may be stored for a single session (session cookies) or for a longer period (persistent cookies), depending on their purpose.

howWeUseCookies.title: How We Use Cookies
howWeUseCookies.description: We use cookies to: (1) Keep you signed in and remember your preferences so you do not have to re-enter them; (2) Understand how you use our service (e.g. which pages you visit and how long you stay) so we can improve performance and usability; (3) Support security and fraud prevention; (4) Comply with your cookie consent choices. We only use non-essential cookies (e.g. analytics) where we have a lawful basis and, where required, your consent.

typesOfCookies.title: Types of Cookies We Use
typesOfCookies.description: We use the following types of cookies: (1) Strictly necessary cookies — required for the service to function (e.g. authentication, load balancing); these cannot be disabled. (2) Functional cookies — used to remember your settings and choices (e.g. language, region). (3) Analytics and performance cookies — help us understand how visitors use the service (e.g. page views, errors) so we can improve it; we may use first-party or third-party analytics providers. (4) Marketing cookies — only used if you consent, to deliver relevant content or measure ad effectiveness. You can manage your preferences for non-essential cookies via our cookie banner or your browser settings.

managingCookies.title: Managing Cookies
managingCookies.description: You can control cookies in several ways: (1) Use our cookie banner when you first visit to accept all, accept only necessary cookies, or customize your choices. (2) Change your mind later via the link in the footer or in your account preferences, where available. (3) Use your browser settings to block or delete cookies; note that blocking all cookies may affect the usability of the service and some features may not work. (4) Use third-party tools or browser extensions to manage tracking. For more information, see your browser's help section or visit sites such as allaboutcookies.org.

updates.title: Updates to This Policy
updates.description: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, or legal requirements. We will post the updated policy on this page and update the effective date and version. For material changes, we may also notify you by email or through the service. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Your continued use of the service after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy, subject to any additional consent we are required to obtain by law.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or this Cookie Policy, or to exercise your preferences, please contact us using the contact details provided in our Terms of Service or on our website.
